auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Similarweb API key sent with the api_key query parameter. Generate it in Settings > Account > API: https://developers.similarweb.com/docs/get-api-key

actions.name: get_rank_tracker_describe
actions.description: List Similarweb rank-tracker campaigns and their scraping configurations for follow-up reporting APIs.

inputSchema.description: This action does not require any input fields.

campaignId.description: The unique identifier of the rank-tracker campaign.

mainDomain.description: The primary tracked domain for the campaign.

user.description: The campaign creator returned by Similarweb.

tags.description: The campaign tags returned by Similarweb.

id.description: The unique identifier of the scraping configuration.

device.description: The device type used by the scraping configuration.

language.description: The language configured for the scraping configuration.

location.description: The location configured for the scraping configuration.

searchEngine.description: The search engine configured for the scraping configuration.

items.description: A rank-tracker scraping configuration returned by Similarweb.

scrapingConfigurations.description: The scraping configurations available for the campaign.

items.description: A rank-tracker campaign returned by Similarweb.

campaigns.description: The rank-tracker campaigns returned by Similarweb.

outputSchema.description: The rank-tracker campaign metadata returned by Similarweb.

actions.name: get_similar_rank_top_sites
actions.description: List Similarweb top-ranked websites for a country and category, defaulting to the global $All ranking when filters are omitted.

limit.description: The maximum number of ranked sites to return.

offset.description: The zero-based offset into the ranked results.

country.description: The country code to query. Defaults to world for a worldwide ranking.

category.description: The Similarweb category path segment. Defaults to $All when omitted.

startDate.description: The start month for the ranking window in YYYY-MM format.

endDate.description: The end month for the ranking window in YYYY-MM format.

sort.description: The field used to sort the ranked results.

ascending.description: Whether to sort the ranked results in ascending order.

showVerified.description: Whether to include only verified domains in the ranked results.

mainDomainOnly.description: Whether to include only main domains in the ranked results.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving Similarweb top-site rankings.

rank.description: The traffic rank position of the website.

items.description: A ranked website returned by Similarweb.

topSites.description: The ranked top sites returned by Similarweb.

meta.description: The response metadata returned by Similarweb.

actions.name: get_subscription_status
actions.description: Get the remaining Similarweb usage allowance for the connected API key.

inputSchema.description: This action does not require any input fields.

allowance.description: The total data credits allocated to the API key.

userRemaining.description: The remaining Similarweb data credits for the API key.

outputSchema.description: The subscription usage returned by Similarweb.
